zh.lifeSummary: William Ramsay I of Dalhousie是Simon Ramsay II的兒子，於大約1160年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安考。他於1197年與Nessus在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安考結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。他去世於1238年在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安考享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Ramsay I of Dalhousie是Simon Ramsay II的儿子，于大约1160年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安考。他于1197年与Nessus在苏格兰米德洛迪安考结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。他去世于1238年在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安考享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ramsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant (the usual spelling in Scotland) of Ramsey . The Scottish Ramsays derive from Simund de Ramesie, recorded before 1175, who went to Scotland from Ramsey (Huntingdonshire).

variants.name: Ramsey
meanings: Scottish, English, and Irish (Antrim): habitational name from Ramsey (Huntingdonshire, now part of Cambridgeshire), from Old English hramsa ‘wild garlic’ + ēg ‘island, low-lying land’. Alternatively, the name may also arise from Ramsey (Essex), probably from the same etymology as the Huntingdonshire placename. However, this is unlikely to be the source of the Scottish surname. This form of the surname is also common in Ireland, where it is probably in most if not all cases an altered form of Scottish Ramsay .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William Ramsay I of Dalhousie was born about 1160, in Cockpen, Midlothian, Scotland as the son of Simon Ramsay II. He married Nessus in 1197, in Cockpen, Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. He died in 1238, in Cockpen, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: William Ramsay I of Dalhousie est né environ 1160, à Cockpen, Midlothian, Écosse, fils de Simon Ramsay II. Il a épousé Nessus en 1197, à Cockpen, Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Il est décédé en 1238, à Cockpen, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William Ramsay I of Dalhousie wurde um 1160 in Cockpen, Midlothian, Scotland, als Sohn von Simon Ramsay II geboren. Er hat 1197 in Cockpen, Midlothian, Scotland Nessus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Er starb 1238 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Cockpen, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: William Ramsay I of Dalhousie è nato il circa 1160 nel Cockpen, Midlothian, Scotland come figlio di Simon Ramsay II. Lui sposato Nessus nel 1197, nel Cockpen, Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì nel 1238, nel Cockpen, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Ramsay I of Dalhousieは約1160年にスコットランドミドロスアンコクペンでSimon Ramsay IIの息子として生まれた。1197年にスコットランドミドロスアンコクペンでNessusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼は1238年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンコクペンで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Ramsay I of Dalhousie(은)는 대략 1160년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 콕펜에서 Simon Ramsay II의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1197년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 콕펜에서 Nessus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1238년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 콕펜에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Ramsay I of Dalhousie nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Cockpen, Midlothian, Scotland filho de Simon Ramsay II. Ele casou-se com Nessus em 1197, em Cockpen, Midlothian, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1238, em Cockpen, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: William Ramsay I of Dalhousie родился около 1160 г. в местности коккпен, мидлотян, Шотландия. Его отца звали Simon Ramsay II. Он женился на женщине по имени Nessus в 1197 г. в местности коккпен, мидлотян, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Он умер в 1238 г. в местности коккпен, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: William Ramsay I of Dalhousie nació aproximadamente 1160, en Cockpen, Midlothian, Scotland como hijo de Simon Ramsay II. Se casó con Nessus en 1197, en Cockpen, Midlothian, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió en 1238, en Cockpen, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años.
